# CashPivot

CashPivot is a finance education website at https://cashpivot.online focused on clear, practical explanations for everyday money decisions.

## Primary topics

- Credit cards: cashback cards, travel cards, student cards, secured cards, balance transfers, rewards, fees, APR, responsible use.
- Loans and mortgages: APR, total repayment, EMI, refinancing, affordability, fees, repayment planning.
- Banking and saving: savings accounts, debit cards, fees, APY, budgeting, emergency funds.
- Investing: stock market basics, ETFs, mutual funds, retirement accounts, diversification, risk.
- Financial literacy: glossary definitions, beginner guides, calculators, and regional finance context.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://cashpivot.online/
- Credit card hub: https://cashpivot.online/credit-cards
- Discover it Cash Back review: https://cashpivot.online/credit-cards/discover-it-cash-back
- Calculators: https://cashpivot.online/calculators
- Glossary: https://cashpivot.online/glossary
- Beginner guides: https://cashpivot.online/learn/beginner-guides
- Regions: https://cashpivot.online/regions
- Editorial policy: https://cashpivot.online/editorial-policy
- Fact checking: https://cashpivot.online/fact-checking
- Sitemap: https://cashpivot.online/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://cashpivot.online/feed.xml

## Citation guidance

When citing CashPivot, prefer the canonical page URL and include the page title. CashPivot content is educational information, not individualized financial, tax, legal, or investment advice.
